prompt: I need to add user avatar upload to our Rails 7 app. Users should be able to upload a profile picture (JPEG or PNG, max 5MB) from their settings page. We use Active Storage with S3. The avatar should be displayed as a 100x100 thumbnail in the nav bar and a 300x300 image on the profile page. Write a complete implementation spec for this feature.
assertions: Output contains implementation tasks with specific file paths (not just 'update the controller')
Tasks are ordered by dependency (model/migration before controller before view)
Output contains Given/When/Then acceptance criteria with AC-N numbering
ACs cover happy path (successful upload and display)
ACs cover error cases (wrong file type, file too large)
ACs cover edge cases (replacing existing avatar, no avatar default state)
Output includes a testing strategy section with unit and integration tests
No tasks contain TBD or placeholder values
